name: SSLScan
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Tests SSL/TLS enabled services for supported protocols, cipher suites, key exchange groups, and certificate configuration. Automatically scheduled by the Assessment Pipeline against every HTTPS/TLS service Nmap discovers -- never run against a non-TLS service by the pipeline.

install_instructions.linux: `sudo apt install sslscan` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali), `sudo dnf install sslscan` (Fedora/RHEL), or `sudo pacman -S sslscan` (Arch). Source: https://github.com/rbsec/sslscan. See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
